text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, as I arrive at the academy<n>gates...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: All right, time to take on the perimeter.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're running the perimeter too?<n>Then how
about goin' one-on-one<n>with me?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, Hishiama?! One-on-one? You<n>mean... a
race?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! You ought to be in good<n>condition since
you're just startin',<n>right?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I've been wantin' to see what<n>you've got, so
throw everything at<n>me!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wait, wha—huuuh?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... The final stretch!I've got nothing left in me... but if Ican overtake her here...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh, makin' your move now, eh?<n>Bring it on! I'll
crush you with<n>everything I've got!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
No... way... She's still got more in<n>her?! I... I can
still win this!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: YAAAAAHHH!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... It still wasn'tenough... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Great job, Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... You barely broke asweat... You really are strong... Phew.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you were pretty good too! It felt<n>so good to
run against an equal!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Now you're just being nice... Don't<n>worry, I
knew how this was gonna<n>pan out from the
beginning.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about? You<n>geared up
around the corner and<n>gave me a run for my
money.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I could tell how serious ya were! I've<n>got to say,
I really dig that fire!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Gah! Th-there's no fire in me! No<n>more
compliments, please!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Bahaha! No need to get all<n>embarrassed!
Anyway, I'm gonna go<n>run another lap. Let's do
this again<n>sometime!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Geez, that was mortifying. How does<n>she have
the energy to keep going?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I've got no chance against someone<n>like her,
but...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Maybe I could handle... a little light<n>jogging.
